BNN_Model module

class src.model.BNN_Model.FlexibleSimpleNN(hidden_layers: ~typing.Sequence[int] = (50, ), output_size: int = 1, activation: callable = <jax._src.custom_derivatives.custom_jvp object>, kernel_init: callable = <function variance_scaling.<locals>.init>, bias_init: callable = <function zeros>, use_for_regression: bool = False, parent: ~flax.linen.module.Module | ~flax.core.scope.Scope | ~flax.linen.module._Sentinel | None = <flax.linen.module._Sentinel object>, name: str | None = None)

Bases: Module

A flexible neural network model that can be customized for different architectures and tasks.

hidden_layers

Sequence of integers where each integer defines the number of neurons in a hidden layer. :no-index:

Type:

Sequence[int]

output_size

Size of the output layer. :no-index:

Type:

int

activation

Activation function to use in the hidden layers. :no-index:

Type:

callable

kernel_init

Initialization function for kernel weights. :no-index:

Type:

callable

bias_init

Initialization function for biases. :no-index:

Type:

callable

use_for_regression

Flag to determine whether the network is used for regression or classification. :no-index:

Type:

bool

name: str | None = None
parent: Module | Scope | _Sentinel | None = None
predict(weights, x_input)
scope: Scope | None = None
class src.model.BNN_Model.SimpleCNN(num_classes: int = 10, parent: ~flax.linen.module.Module | ~flax.core.scope.Scope | ~flax.linen.module._Sentinel | None = <flax.linen.module._Sentinel object>, name: str | None = None)

Bases: Module

Defines a simple convolutional neural network (CNN) for image classification.

num_classes

Number of output classes for the classification task. :no-index:

Type:

int

name: str | None = None
parent: Module | Scope | _Sentinel | None = None
scope: Scope | None = None
src.model.BNN_Model.build_model(key, x_train, hidden_layers=(50, ), output_size=10, activation=<jax._src.custom_derivatives.custom_jvp object>, kernel_init=<function variance_scaling.<locals>.init>, bias_init=<function zeros>, use_CNN=False, use_for_regression=False)

Builds and initializes a neural network model based on specified configurations.

Parameters:

  • key – JAX random key for initialization.

  • x_train (jax.numpy.ndarray) – Sample input data used to define input shape.

  • hidden_layers (tuple, optional) – Tuple defining the number of units in each hidden layer.

  • output_size (int, optional) – The size of the output layer.

  • activation (callable, optional) – Activation function for the hidden layers.

  • kernel_init (callable, optional) – Weight initialization function.

  • bias_init (callable, optional) – Bias initialization function.

  • use_CNN (bool, optional) – Flag to choose between CNN and a simple flexible network.

  • use_for_regression (bool, optional) – Flag to specify if the model is intended for regression.

Returns:

The initialized model, the tree definition for parameter transformation, and a flattened parameter vector.

Return type:

tuple
